data.name: Trouble Magic
data.detailed_description:
Trouble Magic is a classic-style JRPG packed with seductive monster girls, powerful witches, and dangerous magic gone rogue.

When a magical catastrophe threatens the world, it’s up to you — a rising Hero — to battle corrupted sorceresses, forge unlikely alliances, and uncover the secrets of a realm where beauty and danger walk hand in hand.

Prepare for turn-based combat, charming companions, and a story full of mystery, mischief, and magic.

Two modes of play:

Switch back and forth between Classic JRPG turn-based battles and Quick Action System at any moment to suit your playstyle. Turn-Based combat offers a large variety of options to maximise damage, while Quick Action System keeps you engaged with the ever-changing situation on the battlefield.

Twist on level-up mechanics:

Instantly level up your characters by collecting power orbs during battle. No XP grind. But don't rush too quickly! Power orbs provide many advantages when left unclaimed, creating unique risk-reward scenarios in combat.

Dynamic difficulty:

Difficulty matches up to player skills on the go, keeping combat encounters fresh and challenging.

Distinct Character Abilities:

Each party member brings unique skills to the battlefield. Master their strengths to overcome enemies and control the flow of combat.

Monster Girls:

Cute on the outside, ferocious on the inside. These wild adversaries won’t go down without a fight. Have you got what it takes to tame them?

Save the World:

Bring witches to justice with your trusty whip! One shredded outfit at a time.

Clothing is optional. Victory is not.

data.short_description: Trouble Magic mixes classic JRPG with monster girls and sexy witches. When magic turns deadly and the fate of the world hangs in the balance, a true hero must rise to the challenge and punish the evil. Embark on a journey to discover the mysterious world of seductive beauties with lethal attitudes.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9.0 Compatible Card with 1GB of VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 450 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9.0 Compatible Card with 1GB of VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
